title: LLNS Postdoc and Fellowship Programs
description: As one of our postdocs, you'll have the opportunity to conduct cutting-edge research and collaborate with other experts in various fields.
text:
In addition to our postdoc program, we offer a handful of highly-competitive fellowships at LLNL. Fellows are free to pursue their own research agenda under the guidance of a senior staff scientist who serves as a mentor. Additionally, fellows are expected to conduct their research in a collaborative, multidisciplinary manner with others in a team environment. Our fellows have conducted research in laser science and plasma physics, biomedical engineering, cosmochemistry, and a variety of other cutting-edge fields. Learn more about our fellowship programs and application processes below.
Fernbach Postdoctoral Fellowship
The Sidney Fernbach Postdoctoral Fellowship in the Computing Sciences is a highly competitive postdoctoral position that is awarded to candidates with exceptional talent, scientific track records, and potential for significant achievements in computational mathematics, computer science, data science, and/or scientific computing.
High Energy Density Science (HEDS) Fellowship
Fellowships are awarded to candidates with exceptional talent, scientific track records, and potential for significant achievements. Typically, one new fellowship is awarded each year.
Lawrence Fellowship
